name: qvac-smart-camera
description: An on-device security camera example built with the QVAC SDK: YOLOv10 (COCO) detects people, vehicles, animals and bags, and Qwen3-VL scores the risk of each person on-device (a resident coming home is NORMAL; a masked person prowling a car at night is an ALERT). No cloud, no API keys, no frame leaves the machine.
author: QVAC by Tether
